name: @aily-project/board-ameba-amb82-mini
description: Realtek AMB82 MINI development board based on the RTL8735B, with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth LE, camera, audio, and edge AI capabilities.
description_en: Realtek AMB82 MINI development board based on the RTL8735B, with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth LE, camera, audio, and edge AI capabilities.
description_zh_cn: Realtek AMB82 MINI 是一款基于 RTL8735B 的开发板，支持 Wi-Fi、蓝牙低功耗、摄像头、音频和边缘 AI 功能。
author: Realtek
